events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Join us at the next meetup! Seats are first come, first served.
events.noEvents: No upcoming events scheduled. Check back soon!

recordings.title: Trending Talks
recordings.subtitle: The most popular recordings from our community.
recordings.empty: No recordings found for this location.

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: Bonfire brings game developers together in two cities across the {country}.

prague.name: Bonfire@{prague}
prague.description: Our main {prague} venue in the heart of the Czech capital, with meetups featuring talks from local and international game developers.

zlin.name: Bonfire@{zlin}
zlin.description: Bringing the game dev community to Moravia. Regular meetups at UTB university with focus on indie development and student projects.

talkBanner.title: Do you want to give a talk?
talkBanner.subtitle: We're always looking for speakers to share their knowledge and experience.

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about upcoming events and new recordings.
newsletter.successMessage: Thanks for subscribing! We'll keep you updated.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
newsletter.rateLimitError: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.
newsletter.privacyNote: By subscribing, you agree to receive occasional emails. Unsubscribe anytime.

newsletterUnsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
newsletterUnsubscribe.subtitle: Manage your newsletter subscription preferences
newsletterUnsubscribe.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from the Bonfire newsletter? You'll no longer receive updates about upcoming events and new recordings.

success.title: Successfully unsubscribed
success.messageNewsletter: {email} has been removed from our mailing list. You can always resubscribe later!
success.messageAccount: Email updates have been turned off for {email}. You can update your notification preferences anytime in your account settings.
success.messageBoth: {email} has been removed from our mailing list and email updates have been turned off in your account. You can update your preferences in account settings.

errors.notSubscribed: You are not subscribed to our newsletter
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

newsletterArchive.testBannerMessage: This newsletter was sent as a test
newsletterArchive.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently remove the archive page. Any links sent in the original email will stop working for recipients.
newsletterArchive.deleteError: Failed to delete. Please try again.

newsletterArchiveIndex.title: Newsletter archive
newsletterArchiveIndex.subtitle: Past Bonfire updates, all in one place.
newsletterArchiveIndex.emptyHint: Check back soon for the first issue.
